home.title: Welcome
home.text: Welcome to my professional profile. Here you will find my values, leadership approach, experience, and a clear presentation of who I am as a leader in the pharmaceutical industry.

about.title: About
about.text: Bilingual strategic leader (FR/EN) with over 15 years of experience in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology industry. I specialize in behavioral transformation, sustainable commercial performance, and developing autonomy in complex scientific environments. I combine rigor, scientific credibility, and human leadership to build responsible, autonomous teams capable of delivering predictable results.

values.title: Values
values.integrity_text: I make decisions aligned with my principles, even when it is difficult. Integrity builds trust, and trust creates sustainable performance.
values.excellence_text: I aim for high, measurable, and reproducible standards. Excellence is not a one‑time goal but a daily discipline.
values.courage_text: I confront issues quickly, with transparency and respect. Courage enables progress, clarity, and transformation.
values.empathy_text: I understand people, their motivations, and their constraints while keeping focus on objectives. Empathy is not complacency: it is a performance lever.
values.persistence_text: I maintain effort, rigor, and consistency even in uncertainty. Persistence turns intentions into results.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.questioning_text: I develop autonomy by encouraging people to think, decide, and act on their own. Strategic questioning creates responsibility and sustainable performance.
leadership.clarity_text: I clarify expectations, behaviors, and performance standards. Rigor is not control: it is a framework that enables autonomy.
leadership.predictability_text: I transform objectives into concrete, measurable, and reproducible behaviors. A high‑performing team knows why it succeeds.
leadership.calm_text: I maintain a stable, rational, solution‑oriented posture even in uncertainty. Calm amplifies collective performance.
leadership.development_text: I create an environment where people can grow, excel, and become autonomous. A leader’s role is to make others better.

experience.title: Experience
experience.years: 15+ years of experience in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology industry
experience.years_text: I have worked in complex environments where scientific credibility, commercial rigor, and the ability to influence multiple stakeholders are essential.
experience.behavior_text: I transform strategic objectives into concrete, measurable, and reproducible behaviors. This approach enables sustainable and predictable performance.
experience.leadership_text: I have led teams in demanding contexts, combining operational excellence, scientific understanding, and autonomy development.
experience.change_text: I support teams through transitions by clarifying expectations, strengthening responsibility, and creating a framework that fosters growth.
experience.coaching_text: I develop leaders capable of thinking, deciding, and acting with intention. My approach is based on strategic questioning and accountability.

qa.title: Q&A
qa.intro: A section dedicated to frequent questions about my approach, values, vision, and way of working.

items.question: What is your leadership philosophy?
items.answer: I believe results are the direct reflection of individual behaviors. My role is to develop autonomy, strategic thinking, and responsibility rather than impose control.

items.question: How do you support teams in complex scientific environments?
items.answer: I bring structure, rigor, and consistency. I simplify scientific complexity by transforming it into concrete, measurable, and reproducible behaviors.

items.question: What sets you apart as a commercial leader?
items.answer: I focus on behavioral transformation rather than micromanagement. I combine commercial performance with scientific credibility while staying calm under pressure.

items.question: How do you develop autonomy and responsibility?
items.answer: I clarify expectations, then use strategic questioning to help people think, decide, and act intentionally.

items.question: How do you handle difficult situations or performance drops?
items.answer: With courage, transparency, and strategic empathy. I confront issues quickly and support improvement with clear, measurable plans.

items.question: What values guide your work?
items.answer: Integrity, excellence, courage, strategic empathy, and persistence.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Vous pouvez me contacter pour toute opportunité professionnelle ou collaboration stratégique.
